failure.message: bias-detection-smoke.spec.ts:37:3 Dashboard page loads without errors

testcase.failure:
[msedge] › e2e/smoke/bias-detection-smoke.spec.ts:37:3 › Bias Detection Engine - Smoke Tests › Dashboard page loads without errors
Error: browserType.launch: Chromium distribution 'msedge' is not found at /opt/microsoft/msedge/msedge Run "pnpm exec playwright install msedge"
Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: browserType.launch: Chromium distribution 'msedge' is not found at /opt/microsoft/msedge/msedge Run "pnpm exec playwright install msedge"
attachment #1: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../config/test-results/e2e-smoke-bias-detection-s-38c01-d-page-loads-without-errors-msedge-retry1/trace.zip Usage:
pnpm exec playwright show-trace ../config/test-results/e2e-smoke-bias-detection-s-38c01-d-page-loads-without-errors-msedge-retry1/trace.zip
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Retry #2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: browserType.launch: Chromium distribution 'msedge' is not found at /opt/microsoft/msedge/msedge Run "pnpm exec playwright install msedge"
